items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for auto-sync when connection is restored.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement for auto-sync functionality when the connection is restored. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case mentions the need for auto-sync but lacks specific evidence demonstrating that this requirement is satisfied, leading to an inconclusive status.
